---
title: "Methods for Handling Multiple Outcomes in Health Data"
subtitle: 'PCA Clinical Annotation'
author: "Sivakamakshi Muthu Kumarasamy, Shivadarshini Sreekanth"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    self_contained: true
    highlight: "default"
    thumbnails: false
    fig_width: 7
    fig_height: 5
    toc_depth: 3
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
data <- read_excel("PCA_Clinical_Annotation.xls")
str(data)
```
